content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Attached please find the business update for SCS, Lovito, and warehouse for
our discussion tomorrow.

Thank you!

Best,
Chen Gang

content.question:
Thanks.



Slide 6

   - We need to meet both top and bottom line targets?

Will we meet them
   for Nov?
- Fo Nov, our ABS still does not show signs of improvement?

- In general, Nov should be a good month with good traffic and platform
   support?

But it seems like we are performing worse than Sep..





Slide 10

   - Cannot quite understand how to read the table, it does not add up to
   100%



Slide 11

   - I understand that our FBS rates for heavy items are not competitive
   and this is deliberate, but am not sure how this would impact our sourcing?

Slide 13 -14

   - This is probably still not sufficient?

We moved from 68% lower than CB
   seller to probably 65% lower?

Slide 16

   - Are we also looking at category mix as well?

For eg. I know markets
   are keen to push Taobao stuff >> F&B/Fashion/Beauty/Furniture. Are we
   looking at this angle?

Slide 19

   - For Proya, we can still allow them to have pricing control while
   managing consignment model?

All they need to do is to give us the floor
   price that we cannot go below?

Why do we want to have a fix service fee
   model?

Slide 20

   - How did our UE look like on 11.11 vs BAU day?

Is this something that
   we can do more frequently?
There are more campaigns than just 11.11?

For
   eg. 15th, Payday etc.



Slide 24

   - For VN, where are we on exploring 3PFs?
- For BR, they are pushing FBS, are we intending to be part of the push?

Slide 38

   - Does Jap manga collaboration make sense?

Slide 39

   - Did we look at bag accessories in the end?
- And do we have enough accessories/kids fashion in general for this?
- How will we be marketing this?

Slide 41

   - When will the front end feature be ready to do customized clothes?
- When compared to CB sellers, are we able to do it cheaper than them?

If so, it is probably worth investing in it even though the processes are
   manual?

Slide 43

   - PC3 here is daily number?
- What is the contribution of ADO to total Lovito PH ADO?

Slide 46

   - We need to aim for 1-2 launch per month?
Who do we have for VN?
When are we looking at a new KOL collaboration for PH again?

Slide 48

   - Push would probably come more from SCS side as compared to Fashion



Slide 50

   - Bags are not really growing?
- For Kids, do we sell in different shop?

For men do we sell in
   different shop?
Probably should not be putting everything in lovito shop?

*From:* Ian Ho <hoi@sea.com>
*Sent:* Thursday, 13 November 2025 12:44 pm
*To:* 'Gang Chen' <gang.chen@shopee.com>
*Cc:* 'Ning Li' <ning.li@shopee.com>; 'Larry Lin' <larry.lin@shopee.com>;
'Chengchen Huo' <chengchen.huo@shopee.com>; 'Florence Zhai' <
florence.zhai@shopee.com>; 'Roger Yao' <roger.yao@shopee.com>; 'Jessie
Zhang' <mengqi.zhang@shopee.com>; 'Jiang Hans' <hans.jiang@shopee.com>;
'Ran Yang' <russell.yang@shopee.com>; 'Roy Lv' <roy.lv@shopee.com>;
'Charissa Li' <charissa.li@shopee.com>; 'Siqin Liu' <siqin.liu@lovito.com>;
'Shuning Wang' <shuning.wang@shopee.com>; 'Rainy Kong' <
rainy.kong@shopee.com>; Jiahui Ren <renjh@sea.com>; 'Xingguo Liu' <
kala.liu@shopee.com>; 'Bai L' <bai.l@shopee.com>; 'Alex You' <
alex.you@shopee.com>; 'Jinyu Du' <jinyu.du@shopee.com>; 'Di Zhang' <
di.zhangd@shopee.com>; 'Weijia Song' <vega.song@lovito.com>
*Subject:* RE: [Pre-read] SCS & Lovito & Warehouse bi-weekly
update_2025.11.13



Thanks.



Slide 6

   - We need to meet both top and bottom line targets?

Will we meet them
   for Nov?
- Fo Nov, our ABS still does not show signs of improvement?

- In general, Nov should be a good month with good traffic and platform
   support?

But it seems like we are performing worse than Sep..





Slide 10

   - Cannot quite understand how to read the table, it does not add up to
   100%



Slide 11

   - I understand that our FBS rates for heavy items are not competitive
   and this is deliberate, but am not sure how this would impact our sourcing?

Slide 13 -14

   - This is probably still not sufficient?

We moved from 68% lower than CB
   seller to probably 65% lower?

Slide 16

   - Are we also looking at category mix as well?

For eg. I know markets
   are keen to push Taobao stuff >> F&B/Fashion/Beauty/Furniture. Are we
   looking at this angle?

Slide 19

   - For Proya, we can still allow them to have pricing control while
   managing consignment model?

All they need to do is to give us the floor
   price that we cannot go below?

Why do we want to have a fix service fee
   model?

Slide 20

   - How did our UE look like on 11.11 vs BAU day?

Is this something that
   we can do more frequently?
There are more campaigns than just 11.11?

For
   eg. 15th, Payday etc.



Slide 24

   - For VN, where are we on exploring 3PFs?
- For BR, they are pushing FBS, are we intending to be part of the push?

Slide 55

   - Is this something that SCS should do more as well?

Slide 57 – 60

   - Seems like nothing new?
- Anything that helps in our listings or qc process?

or price monitoring
   process?
- How about on CS side?
How we can manage our buyer replies better?
- Do we have cost savings of each of these initiatives?

There is a
   standardized way of calculating this



Slide 69

   - Is this growing the way we want it to be right now?

Who are the
   sellers who are using Anbo WH right now?
Does it make sense to scale or not?

Slide 72 and 73

   - Average waiting time is so poor?

When are we looking at a new KOL collaboration for PH again?

Probably should not be putting everything in lovito shop?
